title: client_task.rs: background JMAP async task
description:
Create crates/jmap-chat-egui/src/client_task.rs implementing the background tokio task.

What: Async background task driving all JMAP network operations.

Algorithm:
1. Function signature: pub async fn run(client: JmapChatClient, base_url: String, tx: mpsc::Sender<AppEvent>, mut rx: mpsc::Receiver<AppCommand>, ctx: egui::Context)
2. On start:
   a. Send StatusChanged(Connecting)
   b. fetch_session() → Session; on error send Error(msg) and retry with backoff
   c. Extract account_id = session.chat_account_id(); send SessionReady { api_url, account_id }
   d. Load chats: chat_query(None, None, None, Some(100)) → chat_get(ids) → send ChatsLoaded
   e. Load read positions: read_position_get(None) → store in local map
   f. Send StatusChanged(Connected)
3. Spawn SSE listener sub-task via tokio::spawn:
   - subscribe_events(&session.event_source_url, None) → stream
   - For each SseFrame:
     - StateChange { changed } → call chat_changes/message_changes for each type, send updated data
     - Typing / Presence → send corresponding AppEvent (if added)
     - Error: sleep backoff, reconnect
4. Main select! loop on rx:
   - AppCommand::SelectChat(id): message_query(Some(id)) → message_get(ids) → send MessagesLoaded; read_position_set if last message known
   - AppCommand::SendMessage{chat_id, body}: message_create(chat_id, ULID, body, 'text/plain', now()) → on success refresh messages
   - AppCommand::MarkRead{chat_id, msg_id}: read_position_set(read_pos_id, msg_id)
5. On any channel closure, exit gracefully.

Defensive rules:
- Never log client tokens or auth headers.
- All errors sent to UI via AppEvent::Error (never panic).
- Backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s max on SSE reconnect.
- Drain outstanding commands after SSE reconnect to avoid duplicate work.
- egui::Context::request_repaint() after every AppEvent send.

Tests (integration, in tests/client_task_test.rs using wiremock):
- startup_loads_chats: mock session + chat_query + chat_get → verify ChatsLoaded received
- select_chat_loads_messages: mock message_query + message_get → verify MessagesLoaded
- send_message_success: mock message_set → verify no error event sent
- sse_state_change_triggers_refresh: mock SSE stream sending StateChange + /changes → verify updated chats received
Oracle: expected events derived from mock fixture JSON files, not from implementation.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p jmap-chat-egui client_task exits 0; all 4 client_task tests pass
close_reason: client_task.rs implemented; cargo check + clippy clean
